title: RV trip prep — blankets, parrilla, Katelin's 18th, Gtano stop
html:
TL;DR

  • December 2020 RV-trip packing + errand list: blankets (ask), Korean black bed (get), lawn chairs, outside lanterns, parrilla to cook (buy) or portable grill, toilet paper, outside speaker.
  • Includes a one-line birthday note drafted to Katelin — "Hey Katelin, I almost forgot, Happy Birthday! Big 18, crazy" — single-mention, identity TBD; potential-entity candidate.
  • "Gtano's: present, griddle, truck questions" — second corpus mention of Gtano, the recurring sports-cards / older-male-mentor figure first implied by the September 2020 mentor prep questions. Two mentions = stub-promotion territory if a third surfaces.
  • Bilingual code-switch (parrilla) confirms the Yahir family cultural register intact even in a logistics list.
  • Genre-marker: this is the Grants Pass teen era RV + dad + present-buying-as-relationship-maintenance shape that recurs through later year-end and trip-planning notes.

Source quote

"Bring blankets (ask) / Black Korean Bed (get) / LWn Chiars to chill (get) / Outside Lanterns / Parrilla to cook (buy) or portable grill"

"Hey Katelin, I almost forgot, Happy Birthday! Big 18, crazy"

"Gtano's: present, griddle, truck questions"

Open questions

  • Who is Katelin? Sister-of-friend? Cousin? The "big 18, crazy" implies same-age peer.
  • Who is Gtano? The truck-questions + griddle gift tracks with an older-mentor or family-friend figure — likely the unnamed mentor in 2020 09 23 sports cards mentor questions. Worth promoting on next mention.
  • Was the RV trip the same Harris State Beach birthday trip referenced in 2020 11 28 yt kids games rv birthday plan?
